jsonld.name: Generative Aesthetic Integration
jsonld.description: Aesthetic evaluation occurring as simultaneous component of creative generation rather than retrospective judgment, where structural quality-checking shapes what gets produced in real-time, making aesthetic assessment architecturally inseparable from creative production itself.
